response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video: 00:00-03:03 is intro talk/banter with multiple characters. No music. 03:03-05:00 is a musical performance. 2. Identified the song 'LOAD' from on-screen text (03:12), with composers FUKU, D3adStock, SARVAL, HAMR. 3. Searched for 'LOAD FUKU D3adStock SARVAL HAMR lyrics'. 4. Found the lyrics on Uta-net and Lyrical Nonsense. 5. Constructed the JSON with the full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory banter and interaction segment, followed by a musical performance of the song 'LOAD' by the group Flow Glow.

scenes.description: The performers engage in an introductory talk and banter on stage. No music is playing.
The performance of the song 'LOAD'. The group Flow Glow sings and dances on stage, with on-screen text identifying the composers as FUKU, D3adStock, SARVAL, and HAMR.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Broadcasting live to the world, this is Holo
Lights of 8 billion stars illuminate the heart
Notifications ringing, it's time to show my digital world
Won't let you sleep until morning, aligning the cursor over the characters
I'm in the studio, writing lyrics in my notebook again today
The changing scenery, quite a lot, realized I've arrived in Tokyo
Looking at the night sky, Shuto Expressway
Boarding a boat heading to the moon
Showing everyone the proof, that I can be your strength
Throwing away negative thoughts, just watching is meaningless
A dream that is no longer just a dream
Famous for being competitive
An endpoint that doesn't exist anywhere
Under the starry sky I saw with you, hands that seem to reach out
If you have this device, I feel like I can go anywhere
Continuing one way, stay with me by my side
To a distant place, just the two of us
From this Earth to a virtual world
Don't care what time it is now
No matter how many thousands of kilometers apart
My team Flow Glow, start taking action immediately
Chat never stops 24/7
In good condition today, posing for the camera, cheese!
Broadcasting from the taken-over radio tower
Distributing to the world, look at this style
Yeah, I don't even have the thought of losing
Throwing away useless pride
I can do this much
Everyone partying all night again tonight
Price rising day by day
If you can do it, you better try
